de.plain: Zeichnung 9. Abziehvorrichtung zum Ausbau der Drehstabfeder. Maßstab 1:1. Teile: 1 Spindel (Werkstoff St 34.11), 2 Druckhülse (Werkstoff St 37.12), 3 Mutter DIN (Werkstoff St 34.11). Zeichnungsnummer III DB 101, Blatt 9.

en-GB.plain: Drawing 9. Puller for removing the torsion-bar spring. Scale 1:1. Parts: 1 spindle (material St 34.11), 2 thrust sleeve (material St 37.12), 3 DIN nut (material St 34.11). Drawing number III DB 101, sheet 9.

runs.text: Drawing 9. Puller for removing the torsion-bar spring. Scale 1:1. Parts: 1 spindle (material St 34.11), 2 thrust sleeve (material St 37.12), 3 DIN nut (material St 34.11). Drawing number III DB 101, sheet 9.

es-ES.plain: Plano 9. Extractor para el desmontaje de la barra de torsión. Escala 1:1. Piezas: 1 husillo (material St 34.11), 2 casquillo de presión (material St 37.12), 3 tuerca DIN (material St 34.11). Número de plano III DB 101, hoja 9.
